pilot_first_policy: Do not expand acceptance to 007/008/009/015/022 until 006 passes real CAD, strict v4/v6, and application UI screenshot manual judgement.
preconditions: SolidWorks must be responsive and unsaved-document risk must be cleared before real CAD rerun.
Only the 006 pilot may run first, and it must run through JobRuntimeFacade/QProcess with the global SolidWorks lock.
Original SLDPRT/SLDASM files must not be modified; use run_dir/input_work copies.
Do not lower QC thresholds and do not count Note/OCR/QC sidecar text as DisplayDim.
Every accepted drawing needs application Drawing Review UI screenshot evidence and a complete manual visual checklist.

section_policy.reason: same-name reference uses only standard/named and projected views

sheet_template_policy.reason: same-name reference controls visible sheet/titleblock style

correction_checks: generated view_count must equal required_view_count
generated view_types must equal required_view_types
generated real DisplayDim count must be >= display_dim_floor
generated semantic layout centers must stay within layout_tolerance_norm
automatic section/detail views must remain disabled when section_policy forbids them

current_ui_status.latest_manual_required_correction: Improve reference-intent DisplayDim selection so the exact 12 kept dimensions cover every required target without retaining dense duplicate/cross-region dimensions, then run exactly one locked 006-only CAD cycle and repeat the Drawing Review UI screenshot/manual checklist gate.

checklist_notes.reference_match: Generated drawing still differs materially from the same-name reference: visible dimension density, diagonal/cross-region dimension lines, and title/notes placement remain non-reference-like.
checklist_notes.view_layout: View family is present, but view scale, visual organization, and dimension geometry do not match the compact reference drawing.
checklist_notes.display_dimensions: The final sheet still contains 24 visible DisplayDims, far above the 12 reference-intent target count.
checklist_notes.dimension_readability: Dimension text, leaders, extension lines, and diagonal cross-region geometry dominate the drawing and reduce manufacturing readability.
checklist_notes.title_block: The title/data area remains positioned and formatted differently from the reference.
checklist_notes.manufacturing_notes: Manufacturing notes are present but still not formatted or placed like the reference note block.

findings: Application Drawing Review UI screenshot was inspected side by side with the same-name reference.
The run uses current-run generated PNG evidence from drw_output/runs/2aba76ff152d.
DisplayDim lifecycle now passes, but the visible drawing still fails the final UI screenshot review.
Final exact prune attempted to reduce the sheet, but restored the over-dense state because deleting to 12 lost required target coverage.
API metrics are supporting evidence only; this UI screenshot review is the final gate and is FAIL.

correction_actions.source_note: Generated drawing still differs materially from the same-name reference: visible dimension density, diagonal/cross-region dimension lines, and title/notes placement remain non-reference-like.
correction_actions.correction_action: Match the same-name SLDDRW reference composition before considering API metrics sufficient.

correction_actions.source_note: View family is present, but view scale, visual organization, and dimension geometry do not match the compact reference drawing.
correction_actions.correction_action: Use the learned normalized layout slots and avoid default title-block-driven sheet placement.

correction_actions.source_note: The final sheet still contains 24 visible DisplayDims, far above the 12 reference-intent target count.
correction_actions.correction_action: Create explicit reference-intent SolidWorks DisplayDim objects for visible manufacturing callouts.

correction_actions.source_note: Dimension text, leaders, extension lines, and diagonal cross-region geometry dominate the drawing and reduce manufacturing readability.
correction_actions.correction_action: Arrange dimensions into readable lanes and reject overlap or sparse generic AutoDimension output.

correction_actions.source_note: The title/data area remains positioned and formatted differently from the reference.
correction_actions.correction_action: Remove or suppress the oversized default title block/frame when it conflicts with the reference layout.

correction_actions.source_note: Manufacturing notes are present but still not formatted or placed like the reference note block.
correction_actions.correction_action: Preserve reference-style notes, roughness, warning text, and compact callout regions.

acceptance_requirements: Fresh run artifacts must be under drw_output/runs/<run_id>/ and must include SLDDRW/PDF/DXF/PNG plus manifest and event log.
Worker stdout/event logs must include job_started, progress, heartbeat, and job_finished or job_failed with reason.
Generated view count and view type counts must match the same-name reference standard.
Projected views must be true projected views, not independent named-view substitutes.
Final persisted/exported real SolidWorks DisplayDim count must meet or exceed the same-name reference floor.
006 reference-intent dimensions must record target key, view slot, selected entity, add method, before/after count, target coverage, and persisted-after-reopen evidence.
Note/OCR/QC sidecar/visual-only text must not be counted as DisplayDim.
Application Drawing Review UI screenshot review must pass with every required manual visual checklist item true.

validation_commands.locked_real_cad_regression: Run one JobRuntimeFacade/QProcess CAD job for "LB26001-A-04-006" only after readiness is clear; do not call SolidWorks from the UI thread.
